metadata.title: Local images
metadata.description: Searches your notes for hotlinked images, downloads, saves them locally than fix tags in md-files.

regex.source: Notice(`Local Images \nStart processing. Total ${pagesCount} pages. `, TIMEOUT_LIKE_INFINITY)
regex.target: Notice(`Local Images \nStart processing. Total ${pagesCount} pages. `, TIMEOUT_LIKE_INFINITY)

regex.source: Notice(`Page "${file.path}" has been processed, but nothing was changed.`)
regex.target: Notice(`Page "${file.path}" has been processed, but nothing was changed.`)

regex.source: name: "Download images locally for all your notes"
regex.target: name: "Download images locally for all your notes"

regex.source: .setDesc("Process active page if external link was pasted.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果粘贴了外部链接，则处理活动页面。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Number of attempts to process content on paste. For me 3 attempts is enouth with 1 second update interval.")
regex.target: .setDesc("处理粘贴内容的尝试次数。对我来说，3次尝试就足够了，更新间隔为1秒。")
.setDesc("处理前清除格式错误的图像标签。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Include only files matching this regex pattern when running on all notes.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在所有笔记上运行时，仅包含与此正则表达式模式匹配的文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Folder to keep all downloaded media files.")
regex.target: .setDesc("用于保存所有下载媒体文件的文件夹。")

regex.source: .setTooltip("I could not process content on the fly when it is pasted. So real processing implements periodically with the given here timeout.")
regex.target: .setTooltip("粘贴内容时，我无法即时处理。因此，真正的处理是在给定的超时时间内定期实现的。")

regex.source: .setTooltip("I could not find the way to access newly pasted content immediatily, after pasting, Plugin's API returns old text for a while. The workaround is to process page several times until content is changed.")
regex.target: .setTooltip("我找不到立即访问新粘贴内容的方法，粘贴后，插件的API会返回旧文本一段时间。解决方法是多次处理页面，直到内容发生更改。")
